                    IRREVOCABLE DOCUMENTARY LETTER OF CREDIT
                          (UCP 600 — ICC Publication)
================================================================================

LC Number:          LC-2026-06-001
Issuing Bank:       Svenska Handelsbanken AB
                    106 70 Stockholm, Sweden
                    BIC: HANDSESS
Issue Date:         2026-06-20
Expiry Date:        2026-09-20
Expiry Place:       Stockholm, Sweden
Applicable Rules:   UCP 600 (ICC Publication No. 600, 2007 Revision)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
APPLICANT (Importer)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Name:               Scandinavian Steel Importers AB
Address:            Industrivägen 42, 412 63 Göteborg, Sweden
Contact:            procurement@scandi-steel.se
Registration No:    556789-1234

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BENEFICIARY (Exporter)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Name:               Deutsche Edelstahl GmbH
Address:            Kruppstraße 88, 45128 Essen, Germany
Contact:            export@deutsche-edelstahl.de
Registration No:    DE123456789

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREDIT AMOUNT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Currency:           EUR
Amount:             1 250 000,00
Tolerance:          +/- 5%

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DESCRIPTION OF GOODS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HS Code:            7219.34 — Stainless steel cold-rolled sheet, width >= 600mm
Specification:      Grade 304L (1.4307), 2B finish, 3.0mm x 1500mm x 3000mm
Quantity:           500 metric tons (+/- 10%)
Unit Price:         EUR 2 500,00 per metric ton
Incoterms:          CIF Göteborg (Incoterms 2020)
Country of Origin:  Germany

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SHIPPING DETAILS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Port of Loading:    Hamburg, Germany
Port of Discharge:  Göteborg, Sweden
Latest Shipment:    2026-08-20
Partial Shipments:  Allowed
Transshipment:      Not Allowed

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DOCUMENTS REQUIRED
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[1] Signed Commercial Invoice in 3 originals + 2 copies
[2] Full set (3/3) clean on-board Marine Bill of Lading, consigned to order of
    Svenska Handelsbanken AB, marked "Freight Prepaid"
[3] Packing List in 3 originals
[4] Certificate of Origin (Form EUR.1) issued by Chamber of Commerce
[5] Mill Test Certificate (EN 10204 3.1) issued by manufacturer
[6] Insurance Certificate covering 110% of CIF value (Institute Cargo Clauses A)
[7] Beneficiary's Certificate confirming shipment of samples by courier to
    Applicant at least 14 days before vessel departure

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BANKING INSTRUCTIONS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Available With:     Svenska Handelsbanken AB, Stockholm
Available By:       Payment at Sight
Drafts Drawn On:    Issuing Bank
Presentation Period: Documents to be presented within 21 days after shipment
                     date but within the validity of the credit

Charges:
  - All banking charges outside Sweden are for the Beneficiary's account
  - Reimbursement subject to URR 725

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Discrepancy fee: EUR 50,00 (or equivalent) to be deducted from proceeds
- This credit is subject to the Uniform Customs and Practice for Documentary
  Credits, 2007 Revision, ICC Publication No. 600 (UCP 600)
- In the event of a discrepancy in the presented documents, the Issuing Bank
  reserves the right to approach the Applicant for a waiver. Such approach
  does not obligate the Issuing Bank to waive the discrepancy.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BANK-TO-BANK INSTRUCTIONS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Upon receipt of documents in conformity with the credit terms, we undertake
to remit proceeds as per your instructions. Please quote our LC number on all
correspondence.

Authorized Signature: ________________________
                      Carl Lindström
                      Head of Trade Finance
                      Svenska Handelsbanken AB

================================================================================
END OF LETTER OF CREDIT — LC-2026-06-001
